productDisplayName: Puma Women Core Jam Shopper Green Bag
description: Style Note puma combines style with utility in their range of handbags. With a dash of colour, innovative shapes and designs which follow fashion trends, this accessory will complete your outfit. Don't miss out on this must-have bag for the season! Product Details A stylish green handbag with graphic black outlining prints with a Puma cat embroidered in the front Two short twill tape green straps One main compartment with a drawstring closure and one internal zippered compartment and organiser pocket Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent Size Height: 49 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 10 cm
